introSection: Montańa Rusa was a Steel Zyklon Roller coaster located at Tibidabo in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catelonia, Spain. Opening in 1961, it was the park's first roller coaster and had a layout similar to those of Zyklon roller coasters. It closed in 2009 following the opening of the new Muntanya Russa coaster.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The coaster was built in-house by the park. It has a layout similar to that of a Zyklon, but with different trains and track.

fullText:
Montańa Rusa was a Steel Zyklon Roller coaster located at Tibidabo in Barcelona, Barcelona, Catelonia, Spain. Opening in 1961, it was the park's first roller coaster and had a layout similar to those of Zyklon roller coasters. It closed in 2009 following the opening of the new Muntanya Russa coaster.

The coaster was built in-house by the park. It has a layout similar to that of a Zyklon, but with different trains and track.
